owner.description: Default GitHub user or organization for all groups. Can be overridden per group.
owner.title: Default owner

log_level.title: Log level
log_level.description: Default output verbosity. Can be overridden with --log-level CLI flag.

settings.description: Named groups of GitHub repository settings (passed to the repos.update API)
settings.title: Settings groups

secrets.description: Named groups of secrets. Each group is one kind: file, value, or resolved.
secrets.title: Secret groups

variables.description: Named groups of variables. Each group is one kind: file, value, or resolved.
variables.title: Variable groups

rulesets.description: Named rulesets defining branch/tag/push protection rules
rulesets.title: Rulesets

groups.description: Named groups of repositories with their settings, secrets, variables, and ruleset assignments
groups.title: Groups

description: Configuration for syncing GitHub repository settings, secrets, variables, and rulesets
title: gh-sync Configuration

LogLevel.description: Controls output verbosity: silent (none), info (summaries), verbose (per-operation), debug (with sources)
LogLevel.title: Log level

is_template.description: Whether the repository is a template that can be used to generate new repositories
is_template.title: Template repository

has_wiki.description: Enable the wiki feature for the repository
has_wiki.title: Wikis

has_issues.description: Enable the issues feature for the repository
has_issues.title: Issues

has_projects.description: Enable the projects feature for the repository
has_projects.title: Projects

has_discussions.description: Enable the discussions feature for the repository
has_discussions.title: Discussions

has_sponsorships.description: Display a Sponsor button for the repository (synced via GraphQL)
has_sponsorships.title: Sponsorships

has_pull_requests.description: Enable the pull requests feature for the repository (synced via GraphQL)
has_pull_requests.title: Pull requests

allow_merge_commit.description: Allow merge commits when merging pull requests
allow_merge_commit.title: Allow merge commits

allow_squash_merge.description: Allow squash merging when merging pull requests
allow_squash_merge.title: Allow squash merging

allow_rebase_merge.description: Allow rebase merging when merging pull requests
allow_rebase_merge.title: Allow rebase merging

allow_auto_merge.description: Allow pull requests to be automatically merged once all requirements are met
allow_auto_merge.title: Allow auto-merge

allow_update_branch.description: Show the update branch button on pull requests
allow_update_branch.title: Always suggest updating pull request branches

squash_merge_commit_title.description: Default title for squash merge commits: PR_TITLE uses the pull request title, COMMIT_OR_PR_TITLE uses the commit message if only one commit, otherwise the PR title
squash_merge_commit_title.title: Squash merge commit title

squash_merge_commit_message.description: Default message body for squash merge commits: PR_BODY uses the pull request body, COMMIT_MESSAGES concatenates all commit messages, BLANK leaves it empty
squash_merge_commit_message.title: Squash merge commit message

merge_commit_title.description: Default title for merge commits: PR_TITLE uses the pull request title, MERGE_MESSAGE uses the classic merge message
merge_commit_title.title: Merge commit title

merge_commit_message.description: Default message body for merge commits: PR_BODY uses the pull request body, PR_TITLE uses the PR title, BLANK leaves it empty
merge_commit_message.title: Merge commit message

delete_branch_on_merge.description: Automatically delete head branches after pull requests are merged
delete_branch_on_merge.title: Automatically delete head branches

web_commit_signoff_required.description: Require contributors to sign off on web-based commits
web_commit_signoff_required.title: Require commit signoff

SettingsGroup.description: GitHub repository settings to apply. Known fields are typed; additional fields are passed through to the API.
SettingsGroup.title: Settings group

file.description: Named entries with file path values, resolved relative to config directory
file.title: File entries

value.description: Named entries with inline values. Strings used as-is, objects JSON-stringified.
value.title: Value entries

resolved.description: Named entries mapped to credential labels. Values come from the active credential profile.
resolved.title: Resolved entries

SecretGroup.description: A group of secrets. Must be exactly one kind: file, value, or resolved.
SecretGroup.title: Secret group

file.description: Named entries with file path values, resolved relative to config directory
file.title: File entries

value.description: Named entries with inline values. Strings used as-is, objects JSON-stringified.
value.title: Value entries

resolved.description: Named entries mapped to credential labels. Values come from the active credential profile.
resolved.title: Resolved entries

VariableGroup.description: A group of variables. Must be exactly one kind: file, value, or resolved.
VariableGroup.title: Variable group

Ruleset.description: A set of rules to apply when specified conditions are met
Ruleset.title: Repository ruleset

name.description: The name of the ruleset (used for matching when creating or updating)
name.title: Ruleset name

enforcement.description: disabled = off, active = enforced, evaluate = test mode (GitHub Enterprise only)
enforcement.title: Enforcement level

creation.description: When true, adds a creation rule
creation.title: Creation shorthand

update.description: When true, adds an update rule with update_allows_fetch_and_merge: true
update.title: Update shorthand

deletion.description: When true, adds a deletion rule
deletion.title: Deletion shorthand

required_linear_history.description: When true, adds a required_linear_history rule
required_linear_history.title: Required linear history shorthand

required_signatures.description: When true, adds a required_signatures rule
required_signatures.title: Required signatures shorthand

non_fast_forward.description: When true, adds a non_fast_forward rule
non_fast_forward.title: Non-fast-forward shorthand

deployments.description: Deployment environments that must succeed; converts to required_deployments rule
deployments.title: Deployments shorthand

BranchRuleset.description: A ruleset that applies to branches
BranchRuleset.title: Branch ruleset

RulesetConditions.description: Conditions that determine when the ruleset applies
RulesetConditions.title: Ruleset conditions

include.description: Ref name patterns to include. Accepts ~DEFAULT_BRANCH, ~ALL, or glob patterns.
include.title: Include patterns

RefNameCondition.description: Conditions for matching ref names (branches or tags)
RefNameCondition.title: Ref name condition

actor_id.description: The ID of the actor, or a { resolved } reference to a credential label.
actor_id.title: Actor ID

actor_type.description: The type of actor that can bypass a ruleset
actor_type.title: Actor type

bypass_mode.description: When the specified actor can bypass the ruleset
bypass_mode.title: Bypass mode

BypassActor.description: An actor that can bypass rules in a ruleset
BypassActor.title: Bypass actor

resolved.description: Reference to a named value in the active credential profile's resolve section
resolved.title: Credential label

ResolvedRef.description: A reference to a credential-resolved value
ResolvedRef.title: Resolved reference

anyOf.description: 'default' targets the default branch; 'all' targets all branches/tags
anyOf.title: Target preset

anyOf.description: Array of include/exclude patterns for fine-grained ref targeting
anyOf.title: Custom target patterns

Targets.description: Shorthand for specifying ref_name conditions: 'default', 'all', or custom patterns
Targets.title: Targets shorthand

TargetPattern.description: An include or exclude pattern for ref matching
TargetPattern.title: Target pattern

update_branch.description: PRs must be tested with the latest code
update_branch.title: Strict status checks

on_creation.description: When false, allows branch creation even if checks would prohibit it
on_creation.title: Enforce on create

default_integration_id.description: Default integration ID applied to all checks that do not specify one
default_integration_id.title: Default integration ID

context.description: The status check context name that must be present on the commit

integration_id.description: The integration ID, or a { resolved } reference to a credential label

operator.description: The operator to use for matching
operator.title: Operator

name.description: Display name for this pattern rule
name.title: Rule name

negate.description: If true, the rule fails when the pattern matches
negate.title: Negate

PatternEntry.description: A pattern matching rule with operator, pattern, and optional name/negate
PatternEntry.title: Pattern entry

dismiss_stale_reviews.description: Dismiss previous approvals when new commits are pushed
dismiss_stale_reviews.title: Dismiss stale reviews

code_owner_review.description: Require review from code owners for files they own
code_owner_review.title: Code owner review

last_push_approval.description: Most recent push must be approved by someone other than the pusher
last_push_approval.title: Last push approval

resolve_threads.description: All review conversations must be resolved before merging
resolve_threads.title: Resolve threads

merge_methods.description: Allowed merge methods. At least one must be enabled.
merge_methods.title: Merge methods

file_patterns.description: File patterns this reviewer must approve (fnmatch syntax)

minimum_approvals.description: Minimum approvals required from this team (0 = optional)
minimum_approvals.title: int

reviewers.description: Teams that must approve specific file patterns
reviewers.title: Required reviewers

PullRequestsShorthand.description: Simplified pull request configuration (branch rulesets only)
PullRequestsShorthand.title: Pull requests shorthand

check_timeout.description: Max time for status checks to report
check_timeout.title: Check timeout (minutes)

grouping.description: Whether all commits or only the head commit must pass checks
grouping.title: Grouping strategy

max_build.description: Max queued PRs requesting checks simultaneously
max_build.title: Max entries to build

max_merge.description: Max PRs merged together in a group
max_merge.title: Max entries to merge

min_merge.description: Min PRs merged together in a group
min_merge.title: Min entries to merge

min_wait.description: Wait time for min group size after first PR is added
min_wait.title: Min wait time (minutes)

draft_prs.description: Review draft PRs before they are marked ready
draft_prs.title: Review draft PRs

on_push.description: Review each new push to the PR
on_push.title: Review on push

tool.description: Name of the code scanning tool
tool.title: Tool name

alerts.description: Severity level at which alerts block updates
alerts.title: Alerts threshold

security_alerts.description: Severity level at which security alerts block updates
security_alerts.title: Security alerts threshold

CodeScanningEntry.description: A code scanning tool with alert thresholds
CodeScanningEntry.title: Code scanning tool

on_creation.description: Enforce workflows when a branch is created (false = skip on creation)
on_creation.title: Enforce on creation

ref.description: Branch or tag of the workflow file

repository_id.description: Repository ID, or a { resolved } reference to a credential label

sha.description: Commit SHA of the workflow file

required.description: Workflows that must pass for this rule
required.title: Required workflows

name.description: The name of the ruleset (used for matching when creating or updating)
name.title: Ruleset name

enforcement.description: disabled = off, active = enforced, evaluate = test mode (GitHub Enterprise only)
enforcement.title: Enforcement level

creation.description: When true, adds a creation rule
creation.title: Creation shorthand

update.description: When true, adds an update rule with update_allows_fetch_and_merge: true
update.title: Update shorthand

deletion.description: When true, adds a deletion rule
deletion.title: Deletion shorthand

required_linear_history.description: When true, adds a required_linear_history rule
required_linear_history.title: Required linear history shorthand

required_signatures.description: When true, adds a required_signatures rule
required_signatures.title: Required signatures shorthand

non_fast_forward.description: When true, adds a non_fast_forward rule
non_fast_forward.title: Non-fast-forward shorthand

deployments.description: Deployment environments that must succeed; converts to required_deployments rule
deployments.title: Deployments shorthand

TagRuleset.description: A ruleset that applies to tags
TagRuleset.title: Tag ruleset

wait_timer.description: Number of minutes to wait before allowing deployments to proceed (0-43200)
wait_timer.title: Wait timer (minutes)

prevent_self_review.description: Prevent the user who triggered the deployment from approving it
prevent_self_review.title: Prevent self-review

reviewers.description: Users or teams required to approve deployments to this environment
reviewers.title: Required reviewers

Environment.description: Configuration for a GitHub deployment environment
Environment.title: Deployment environment

type.description: Whether the reviewer is an individual user or a team
type.title: Reviewer type

id.description: The ID of the user or team
id.title: Reviewer ID

Reviewer.description: A user or team required to review deployments
Reviewer.title: Reviewer

anyOf.description: "all" allows any branch, "protected" allows only protected branches
anyOf.title: Deployment branch preset

anyOf.description: Array of branch or tag name patterns allowed to deploy to this environment
anyOf.title: Custom deployment policies

DeploymentBranches.description: Controls which branches can deploy. Use "all", "protected", or a list of custom policies.
DeploymentBranches.title: Deployment branches

name.description: The name pattern (branch name, tag name, or glob) to allow deployments from
name.title: Pattern

type.description: Whether this policy matches branches or tags. Defaults to "branch".
type.title: Policy type

DeploymentBranchPolicy.description: A custom branch or tag pattern that deployments are allowed from
DeploymentBranchPolicy.title: Deployment branch policy

owner.description: GitHub user or organization that owns these repos. Overrides the top-level owner.
owner.title: Owner override

repos.description: List of repository names (without owner prefix) to sync in this group
repos.title: Repository names

credentials.description: Name of the credential profile to use. If only one profile exists, it is used automatically.
credentials.title: Credential profile

settings.description: Names of settings groups to apply to these repos
settings.title: Settings groups

environments.description: Names of environment definitions to create/update for these repos
environments.title: Environments

rulesets.description: Names of rulesets to apply to these repos
rulesets.title: Rulesets

Group.description: A named group of repositories with their resource assignments
Group.title: Repository group

actions.description: Secret groups to sync as GitHub Actions repository secrets
actions.title: Action secret groups

dependabot.description: Secret groups to sync as Dependabot secrets
dependabot.title: Dependabot secret groups

codespaces.description: Secret groups to sync as Codespaces secrets
codespaces.title: Codespaces secret groups

additionalProperties.description: Secret groups to sync as environment secrets
additionalProperties.title: Environment secret groups

environments.description: Map of environment names to secret group references
environments.title: Environment secret scopes

SecretScopes.description: Assign secret groups to GitHub secret scopes (actions, dependabot, codespaces, environments)
SecretScopes.title: Secret scopes

actions.description: Variable groups to sync as GitHub Actions repository variables
actions.title: Action variable groups

additionalProperties.description: Variable groups to sync as environment variables
additionalProperties.title: Environment variable groups

environments.description: Map of environment names to variable group references
environments.title: Environment variable scopes

VariableScopes.description: Assign variable groups to GitHub variable scopes (actions, environments)
VariableScopes.title: Variable scopes

secrets.title: Secrets cleanup
secrets.description: Controls cleanup of secrets by scope

variables.title: Variables cleanup
variables.description: Controls cleanup of variables by scope

rulesets.title: Clean up rulesets
rulesets.description: Delete repository rulesets not declared in any referenced ruleset group

environments.title: Clean up environments
environments.description: Delete repository environments not declared in config

Cleanup.description: Controls deletion of resources not declared in config. All disabled by default.
Cleanup.title: Cleanup configuration

actions.title: Clean up Actions secrets
actions.description: Delete Actions secrets not declared in any referenced secret group

dependabot.title: Clean up Dependabot secrets
dependabot.description: Delete Dependabot secrets not declared in any referenced secret group

codespaces.title: Clean up Codespaces secrets
codespaces.description: Delete Codespaces secrets not declared in any referenced secret group

environments.title: Clean up environment secrets
environments.description: Delete environment secrets not declared in any referenced secret group

CleanupSecrets.description: Controls deletion of secrets by scope (Actions, Dependabot, Codespaces, environments).
CleanupSecrets.title: Secrets cleanup configuration

preserve.description: Resource names that should never be deleted during cleanup
preserve.title: Preserve list

CleanupScope.description: Controls cleanup for a single resource scope. false disables cleanup, true enables full cleanup, or specify names to preserve.
CleanupScope.title: Cleanup scope

actions.title: Clean up Actions variables
actions.description: Delete Actions variables not declared in any referenced variable group

environments.title: Clean up environment variables
environments.description: Delete environment variables not declared in any referenced variable group

CleanupVariables.description: Controls deletion of variables by scope (Actions, environments).
CleanupVariables.title: Variables cleanup configuration
